overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA IV) showing a character in a leather jacket exploring a rainy urban waterfront at night. The character runs across a wet plaza, ascends stairs, and walks along a promenade overlooking a city skyline with illuminated skyscrapers reflected in the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with city skyline view

events.description: character transitions from walking to running across the plaza
rain becomes more visible as character approaches the stairs

agents.ego_description: running across the rain-slicked plaza toward a set of stairs with the illuminated city skyline ahead

entered.detail: illuminated skyscrapers with various colored lights forming the city backdrop
black metal railing marking the edge of the waterfront promenade
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting city lights
classic black lamppost with glowing white light
dark silhouettes of trees against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a wide, rain-slicked open plaza at night, heading toward a flight of stairs with the illuminated city skyline visible in the distance. The area is completely empty with a metal railing marking the waterfront edge and a street lamp providing local illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade with modern building facade

events.description: character begins ascending the concrete stairs
character reaches top of stairs and turns left to continue along the promenade

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and walking along an elevated path beside a modern illuminated building with trees lining the walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading to the upper promenade level
tall building with grid of illuminated yellow windows
row of trees with green foliage lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a flight of concrete stairs to an elevated promenade and proceeds along a path lined with trees and a modern glass office building with illuminated windows. The waterfront railing recedes to the right as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront observation deck with metal railing

events.description: character reaches the waterfront railing and begins walking alongside the water
character stops at the railing to observe the city skyline across the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing and stopping to look out at the illuminated city skyline reflected in the water

entered.detail: dark water reflecting the city lights with gentle ripples
ornate black lamppost with bright white light near the railing
wooden dock structure extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a waterfront promenade right beside the water's edge, passing a street lamp, and stops at the railing to observe the stunning illuminated skyline reflected in the dark water. The scene is serene with rain continuing to fall gently over the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked plaza toward an elevated waterfront promenade overlooking a glowing city skyline. It begins with the character running across an empty, wet open space under the glow of a street lamp, heading toward a distant cluster of illuminated skyscrapers. As the character ascends a flight of concrete stairs, the scene shifts to an elevated path lined with trees and a modern glass office building with lit windows. The camera then follows the character along the water's edge, passing another street lamp before coming to a halt at the railing. Finally, the movement settles as the character stops to observe the serene, rain-streaked city skyline reflected in the dark water.
